title: anthurium × selloanum
intro: Anthurium × selloanum, also known as the Velvet Card, is a hybrid plant species within the anthurium genus, characterized by its velvety, heart-shaped leaves and long-lasting white or red flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of anthraquinones. The health benefits of Anthurium × selloanum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
